segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss Windows update issues, Discord problems, and technical troubleshooting

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle recounts Denver Airport experiences: bus boarding inefficiency and passenger incompetence

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle tells story of Delta flight: two women taking eight seats and requesting iced coffee

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle shares workplace joke about coffee: 'it's not my cup of tea' pun

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss ISS, reference frames, physics Reddit debates about pull-ups and treadmills

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss physics, Reddit, third-party apps, NYT crossword paywall, and campaign backgrounds

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Discussion of Notion campaign notes, currencies from first campaign, returning NPCs like Elias

segments.label: recap
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny recaps first mega session: fire, dream sequence, meeting Illmari and crew, investigating Flynn's death, sewers, augers, satellite dish recovery, Zorbon meeting

segments.label: recap
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny recaps previous session: satellite dish heist, leveling up, party returns to Sin and Tonic

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss mythic points, hero points, and joke about buying vowels; GM clarifies tavern layout

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle wakes and goes downstairs; GM clarifies the tavern layout is single-floor.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu asks about Fane mechanics (size, power, multiple hearts); GM explains with examples of Concordia and RunGunners.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: OOC banter about the word 'patchwork' and a villain from campaign one; players joke about past encounters.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party gathers for breakfast at Sin and Tonic; Argyle asks Ginny about fire repellent; Johnny finds ornate fans

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses to-do list: decode receiver, patch walls, attend meeting; plans to buy tinfoil and eggs; Anzu wants to track Tywelwyn

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses acquiring equipment and weapons; characters check resources and negotiate with a merchant contact in town.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss equipment purchases, armor costs, discounts, and party finances

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anok offers work at a scrapyard; party discusses job options and decides to visit Johnny's contact for armor

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party travels to Undertable pawn shop; Anzu's raven Othello arrives; Johnny introduces party to Smiler the centaur proprietor

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Smiler describes his shop; Johnny negotiates friend discount; Smiler offers Benny a tiny gun for self-defense

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party sells items to Smiler at pawn shop, negotiates radio price, Argyle gets new armor

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party leaves pawn shop, heads toward scrapyard, Anzu examines Benny's permission slip

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Players ask questions about their characters' backgrounds in Belvedere; GM provides lore answers about education, children, and a vaguely familiar name.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses origins and backstories; Benny reveals Pulse spoke to him, gave glowing pick

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party reacts to Benny's revelation; Argyle shows new business card, discusses classified parents

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses glowing items from dreams, Argyle's new business cards and licensing, and plans to visit the junkyard

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM narrates the party's arrival at Sableclutch Scrap, describing the neighborhood and its religious character.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: GM calls for will saves; players roll, reroll using mythic points, and discuss results with mechanical focus.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM narrates arrival at Sableclutch Scrap, party spots Copperjaw operating crusher, Johnny casts musical accompaniment

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party meets Copperjaw, Benny shakes his hand and loses athletics check, gets knuckles ground together

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Copperjaw offers jobs: guarding (70 gp) or moving (100 gp); party chooses moving, receives locked suitcase

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu asks about danger; Copperjaw warns of two mysterious people interested in the suitcase; OOC tangent about Michelin guides

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Copperjaw gives Diamond District address, party prepares to depart; Johnny prestidigitates everyone clean

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party negotiates payment details with Cobblejaw, discusses the mysterious suitcase delivery job and Benny's weapons loadout

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM clarify mechanics of Anzu's animal companion perception bonus and eye-viewing ability cooldown.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny and Anzu take a break to use the stream while the GM steps away; players announce their departure.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss character identities and backstories out of character, joking about Benny's character being a pug

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party walks toward trolley with Othello scouting overhead; Johnny asks Benny about hobbies and comics

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Perception checks reveal party draws attention due to nine-year-old with chained briefcase; shadowy figure follows them

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss marching order and character details; conversation devolves into meta-discussion about character race and appearance.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Goblin pickpocket attempts to steal from Johnny; party pursues but loses him in alley; Black Line cops approach after commotion

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu's bird Othello spots two Black Line cops approaching; they're not Threshold Authority.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny persuades cops to pursue pickpocket; gives contact info via Coppajaw at Sableclutch scrap.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle scouts for more cops; they position themselves around party in tactical formation.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle questions cops' ID; Johnny backs up near Benny; cops mention delivery and leave.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party debates attacking cops; Othello follows cops who vanish; group heads to trolley station.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Othello scouts the area and loses sight of the cops; party makes it back to the trolley station without incident.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party arrives at trolley station and waits for train; GM calls for perception check.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Rules discussion about vehicle costs, transport between city areas, and slide device mechanics.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party arrives at trolley station; perceives three waiting people; tram arrives and doors open.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party boards tram; Benny sits by window; Argyle attempts to talk to other passengers.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle checks if passengers are skinwalkers; identifies factory workers and lost tourists.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Tram moves to Void 2; more passengers board; Johnny spots goblin factory worker eyeing briefcase.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party boards tram, GM describes passengers; Argyle guards child, more people board at next station

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Tram moves to Void 2; more passengers board; Johnny spots goblin factory worker eyeing briefcase.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny gives orders to spread a message and keep watch on Anaïs; Benny comments on private trams.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Tram reaches final stop; party disembarks, discusses walking vs taxi to destination

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party checks for pursuing goblins, confirms they've gone a different direction, and prepares to move on.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses strategy for potential ambush in alleys and scouts for a good location using Othello.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party walks through alley, two office workers transform into fleshy creatures; combat initiated

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Initiative rolls, weapon rune progression discussion, Foundry setup clarification, mythic role bug fix

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Combat round 1: Argyle strikes twice, Benny intimidates and damages Ugathol I, Ugathol II prepares counterattack

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Benny intimidates Ugathal I, Argyle takes damage and gets grabbed, Benny interrupts Ugathal I's blood nourishment with a critical hit

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny casts Courageous Anthem and Soothe, demoralizes Ugathal II, recites melancholy library poem

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu recalls knowledge on creatures, casts Telekinetic Rend on both Ugathals, uses shield

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle strikes Ugathal I twice, treats wounds with critical success, gains mythic point back

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Benny kills Ugathal I with intimidating strike, Ugathal II attempts blood nourishment but gets interrupted, debate over grabbed condition duration

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Party finishes combat against Ukathals; Anzu uses telekinetic projectile, Argyle delivers killing blow, party finds badges on corpses

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM banter about adding 'Agent of' to business cards and joking about fraud.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Post-combat discussion: players and GM discuss enemy stats, crit mechanics, weapon builds, and reactive strikes in a casual meta-game conversation.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Rules discussion about weapon potency, armor potency, unarmed attacks, and hand wraps for spellcasters

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss scheduling for next month, Johnny's trip to Japan, Tanner's Italy trip, Argyle's wedding; discussion of Noah's book manuscript
